explicit_text: My name is Masamoto Nishimura, born on January 26, 1895, in Tottori Ken. I was given to my uncle's family as a yoshi when I was just over a year old. I studied at Northwest Nazarene College and eventually worked as a pastor in the Free Methodist Church in Los Angeles.
